text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF Other Chronic or Potentially Disabling Conditions Segment Codebook │ August 2025 │ V 1.7 
11 
BRAINJ_MEDICARE 
LABEL: 
Traumatic Brain Injury and Nonpsychotic Mental Disorders due to Brain Damage End-of-Year Indicator 
— Medicare Only Claims 
DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates whether a beneficiary met the condition criteria for traumatic brain injury and 
nonpsychotic mental disorders as of the end of the calendar year. 
SHORT
